creator: yongari@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

A lot of change made to msk(4) to enhance stability so it would 
be great to know if you still see the issue on 8.2-RELEASE. If you 
have similar instability issue on 8.2-RELEASE, please try files at 
the following URL and let me know how it goes. 

http://people.freebsd.org/~yongari/msk/8.2R/if_msk.c 
http://people.freebsd.org/~yongari/msk/8.2R/if_mskreg.h 

Download two files above and rebuild msk(4) on 8.2-RELEASE.
